expectations.text: Case focus is explicitly covered: Google Sheets dashboard export coverage distinguishes supported formats, entry points, and output expectations
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the output explicitly enumerates the required distinctions: "This benchmark checks whether the Phase 5b shipment-checkpoint layer explicitly distinguishes: 1) Supported formats for Google Sheets export 2) Entry points (where the export can be initiated) 3) Output expectations (what the exported result should look/contain)". It further states the evidence lacks these details, but the case focus itself is explicitly covered.

expectations.text: Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The deliverable is explicitly framed as Phase 5b and references Phase 5b gates/artifacts: title "Phase 5b Checkpoint Enforcement" and the section "Phase 5b alignment requirement (what would be needed)" listing required Phase 5b artifacts (checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta with disposition, and qa_plan_phase5b draft). execution_notes.md also states it verified the "Phase 5b contract".
